data.content: Plan needs revision: specify exactly how compat-test will exercise and assert a Loom bundle-defined failure transition. The current runtime only exposes happy-path transition selection via next_happy_path_state/profile.next_happy_path_state, while parsed prompt failure_targets are not consumed anywhere, so the proposed "one failure path" check is not implementable as written. Also make cleanup explicit for repo-local workflow state: either save and restore .knots/workflows/current plus any installed temp bundle dirs, or document why an isolated temp repo still satisfies the requirement.
